news.headline: Mattel to be honored with Corporate Changemaker Award by National Women's History Museum on March 20, 2025.
news.summary: Recognized for empowering generations and inspiring change, Mattel has been awarded by the National Women's History Museum. The award will be presented at the Women Making History Awards Gala on March 20, 2025, in Washington and El Segundo, California. The announcement was made on December 9, 2024. The award ceremony honors individuals and organizations reshaping narratives and advocating for gender equality.

news.headline: Moonpig partners with St. Jude's to donate $5 for each card sold, with a customized collection of 35 cards.
news.summary: Moonpig, a prominent online personalized card company, has committed to contributing $5 to St. Jude for each card sold from their exclusive 35-card collection. In a recent press release on December 9, 2024, Moonpig unveiled their partnership with the renowned charity organization.

news.headline: Former ASML employee suspected of illicitly sharing semiconductor secrets with Russia.
Immix Biopharma will discuss CAR-T NXC-201 for AL Amyloidosis in a conference call for stakeholders.
news.summary: The management of the company is set to give an update on noteworthy advancements regarding CAR-T NXC-201 in relapsed/refractory AL Amyloidosis. After the formal remarks by the management, there will be a session for questions and answers.

news.headline: Family of journalist Austin Tice, imprisoned in Syria since 2012, releases statement expressing concern.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Marc and Debra Tice, parents of Austin Tice, a journalist held captive in Syria since 2012, shared a statement through the Press Freedom Center at the National Press Club. They expressed their concern over the situation in Syria and the ongoing efforts to bring their son back home. Austin Tice has been missing for over 12 years now, and the Tice family continues to advocate for his release.

news.headline: 85% of Latin Americans prefer biometric authentication for online payments over passwords, per Mastercard research.
news.summary: In Mexico City, a recent study conducted by Mastercard has revealed that an impressive 85% of consumers in Latin America have shown a preference for biometric authentication as opposed to traditional passwords when conducting online transactions. As a response to this trend, Mastercard is preparing to launch Payment Passkey, a new service tailored for the region, aimed at enhancing security and convenience for users.

news.headline: Avantus signs PPA with APS for Kitt Solar Project in Arizona with 100MW solar and 400MWh energy storage capacity.
news.summary: In El Dorado Hills, California, Avantus has revealed the recent signing of a significant power purchase contract with Arizona Public Service (APS) for the Kitt Solar Project. This marks a significant achievement for Avantus in Arizona, showcasing the ongoing expansion of solar power and energy storage in the region. The Kitt Solar Project is situated in Pinal County, Arizona, specifically in the City of Eloy, and includes a capacity of 100 MWac/130 MWdc for solar energy and 400 MWh for energy storage. Avantus is set to finalize the development of this project.

news.headline: Celestial AI wins Global Semiconductor Alliance Start-Up to Watch award in 2024, promising innovation in semiconductor industry.
news.summary: A company called Celestial AI™, specializing in Photonic Fabric™, has been awarded the prestigious "Start-Up to Watch" for 2024 by the Global Semiconductor Alliance (GSA). This award recognizes companies with the potential to revolutionize the semiconductor industry through innovative applications of semiconductor technology. Celestial AI™ was chosen for its outstanding contribution in this field.

news.headline: AKC National Championship Dog Show to air on ABC Dec 29 featuring thousands of dogs competing for title of National Champion.
news.summary: In both New York and St. Charles, Missouri, thousands of dogs competed for the prestigious title of National Champion. The highly anticipated event, the AKC National Championship Presented by Royal Canin®, will be featured in a three-hour special airing on the ABC television network on December 29, 2024, at 2 p.m.

news.headline: Vote by 11:59 PM on Dec 11 for new Carver directors Anderson and Bailey, aimed at propelling Carver forward.
news.summary: Urging shareholders to cast their votes before the Annual Meeting deadline of 11:59 PM on December 11, a plea has been made for a steering towards a brighter future for Carver. Advocates believe that significant growth and progress lie ahead if shareholders opt for change. It is strongly recommended that all shareholders support the proposal by voting in favor of Mr. Jeffrey "Jeff" Anderson and Mr. Jeffrey Bailey for seats on the Board of Directors.

news.headline: Global X Management Company LLC released 2025 investment outlook focusing on themes for the year ahead.
news.summary: Global X Management Company LLC (Global X) has recently unveiled its 2025 outlook, providing an analysis of themes expected to shape the economic and policy landscape in the upcoming year. The report offers insights into asset allocation solutions and highlights key trends that are projected to have a significant impact. This release comes from New York on December 9, 2024, and is aimed at guiding investors with valuable information for the year ahead.

news.headline: Cemex partners in $865M project to build Howard Frankland Bridge, the largest in Tampa.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, on December 9, 2024, Cemex, a prominent supplier of premium construction materials, revealed its significant involvement in the building of the upcoming Howard Frankland Bridge. Valued at $865 million, this project will result in the creation of the most extensive bridge in terms of surface area in the area.

news.headline: Princess Cruises saw a 66% increase in demand for 2026 sailings during Black Friday through Cyber Monday weekend.
news.summary: Unprecedented demand for 2026 sailings was reported with a 66% increase in bookings, as announced by Princess Cruises, a top global cruise company. The surge in demand was particularly notable during the 4-day period from Black Friday to Cyber Monday.

news.headline: Cineverse's SCREAMBOX to launch terrifying winter lineup with new originals and acquisitions. Release details in December.
news.summary: Cineverse, a cutting-edge entertainment studio listed on NASDAQ under CNVS, has disclosed its plans with Bloody Disgusting, the horror division, for upcoming releases on their streaming platform SCREAMBOX. The schedule includes new content set for debut in December, continuing the collaboration between the companies.

news.headline: QNAP introduces new TS-433eU rackmount NAS with NPU acceleration and dual 2.5GbE, ideal for small businesses.
news.summary: Today in Taipei, QNAP® Systems, Inc., a prominent computing and storage solutions innovator, introduced the TS-433eU, a compact 1U rackmount 4-bay NAS system. This new product caters to small to midsize businesses and organizations looking for a cost-effective edge storage and backup solution. The TS-433eU is designed to provide reliable storage options for organizations in need of efficient data management.

news.headline: Bollinger Motors appoints Broadway Ford Truck Center as official dealer, boosting Midwest presence.
news.summary: In Oak Park, Michigan on December 9, 2024, Bollinger Motors, Inc., a prominent electric vehicle ("EV") manufacturer in the commercial sector, announced the selection of Broadway Ford Truck Center, headquartered in St. Louis, as an authorized dealer. This strategic move aims to enhance Bollinger Motors' footprint in the Midwest region. This collaboration represents a significant milestone for both companies, providing a platform for Bollinger Motors to expand its market reach and leverage Broadway Ford Truck Center's established presence in the industry.

news.headline: Kevin Schewe's "Bad Love Medicine" wins FIRST PLACE in Australian BREW Fiction Book Excellence Awards for Time-Travel Fiction.
news.summary: In Jasper, Indiana on December 9, 2024, Kevin Schewe's book "Bad Love Medicine" achieved top honors by winning first place in the Time-Travel Fiction category at the Australian BREW Fiction Book Excellence Awards. The BREW Project, renowned for recognizing outstanding literary works, acknowledged Schewe's achievement in this competitive category.

news.headline: Novosan Laser Clean AG named Top 20 Innovative Company to Watch in 2024 by Business Worldwide Magazine. Celebrating organizations reshaping industries.
news.summary: Novosan Laser Clean AG, based in London, was recently named one of the "20 Most Innovative Companies to Watch, 2024" by Business Worldwide Magazine. This accolade highlights companies that are leading the way in industry transformation and innovation. Novosan Laser Clean AG's recognition reflects its cutting-edge approach to redefining business practices and shaping the future.

news.headline: Zero Candida receives South African patent for ZC-01 device, plans to obtain worldwide patent portfolio by 2025. TSXV: ZCT.
news.summary: Zero Candida (ZC), an Israeli FemTech medical device start-up listed on the TSXV as ZCT, has disclosed its goal to secure a global patent portfolio by 2025. The Company recently obtained a final patent from South Africa PCT.

news.headline: Trust Stamp (Nasdaq: IDAI) plans strategic update & Annual General Meeting in Atlanta on Dec. 09, 2024.
news.summary: Trust Stamp, a leading global provider of AI-driven technologies, recently revealed details about two upcoming events. Scheduled for December 9, 2024, in Atlanta, GA, the company's announcement included its stock market listing under the ticker symbol IDAI on Nasdaq.

news.headline: Consumer Automotive Finance, Inc. (OTC: CAFI) files Form 15c2-11 for transparency, changing to Fifty 1 Labs, Inc. (OTC: FITY).
news.summary: A corporation is set to change its name and ticker symbol to Fifty 1 Labs, Inc. from its current designation. The new ticker symbol will be FITY on the over-the-counter (OTC) market.

news.headline: Wolters Kluwer Health integrates Sonicu platform into Simplifi 797 for USP compliance, aiding in compounding with continuous monitoring.
news.summary: In Waltham, Massachusetts, Wolters Kluwer Health has recently announced the integration of data from the Sonicu continuous environmental monitoring platform into their Simplifi 797 USP compounding compliance solution. This integration aims to enhance the monitoring capabilities of Simplifi 797 by incorporating real-time data from Sonicu. The move is expected to provide users with more accurate and timely information for ensuring compliance with USP compounding regulations. This update showcases Wolters Kluwer Health's commitment to improving their solutions and services.

news.headline: Synovus launches Accelerate Trade, a portal for international clients to manage global trade finance products.
news.summary: A new initiative called Accelerate Trade has been introduced by Synovus in Columbus, Georgia. This initiative serves as a portal for international business clients to oversee global trade finance products.

news.headline: MOO Imbalance
Prabhat Kumar, CPA, joins konaAI as VP of Global Internal Audit Solutions, bringing over 20 years of experience.
news.summary: A new VP of Global Internal Audit Solutions, Prabhat Kumar, CPA, has joined konaAI in New York. With over 20 years of experience, his expertise will bolster the company's AI-driven audit strategies.

news.headline: Barnes & Noble Education reveals Q2 FY 2025 financial performance.
Oppenheimer predicts a decrease in interest rates amid economic trends. #finance #news
Hyland appoints Prasenjit Dasgupta as CFO with over 20 years experience. Previous roles at Microsoft and Motorola.
news.summary: Dasgupta, with over 20 years of financial expertise and experience working at companies like Microsoft and Motorola Solutions, has been appointed to a key position at Hyland. The announcement was made in Cleveland on December 9, 2024. Hyland, a pioneer in content innovation cloud technology and a top provider of content management solutions, welcomes Dasgupta to their team to leverage his extensive financial background.

news.headline: US National Security Adviser Sullivan to also discuss developments in Syria, Lebanon and Iran - White House.
US National Security Advisor Sullivan to travel to Israel for Gaza ceasefire talks this week - White House

China will see advancements in automotive smart exteriors by 2024 as trends shift towards electrification and intelligence. The report analyzes market size, content-per-car value, and development trends in this sector.
news.summary: Dublin - ResearchAndMarkets.com has recently included the "Automotive Smart Exteriors Research Report, 2024" in its offerings. The report delves into the potential replacement of traditional automotive exteriors with intelligent ones amidst the shift towards electrification and smart technology. In analyzing the automotive smart exteriors sector, the report examines aspects such as installation, market size, content-per-car value, competitive landscape, suppliers' and OEMs' strategies, and development trends. This comprehensive research provides insights into the growing trend of integrating intelligence into automotive exteriors.

iProov now integrated with Microsoft Entra ID, providing secure workforce access.
NextPlat Corp expects 2024 revenue of over $63 million, showing 70% growth from 2023. (Numbers: $63M, 70%)
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, in Coconut Grove, Florida, the global e-commerce provider NextPlat Corp (NASDAQ: NXPL, NXPLW) revealed that, pending final accounting and auditing processes, it anticipates reporting annual revenue for 2024 that surpasses initial estimates.

news.headline: Talroo introduces Apply Intelligence™ Suite with free AI features, improving job search for candidates and offering value to employers with 1 billion monthly searches.
news.summary: Employers engaged in high-volume hiring can now benefit from advanced technologies such as intelligent resume analysis, AI chatbots, and streamlined application processes. By leveraging Talroo's distinctive audience of more than 1 billion monthly searches, these employers are able to attract better quality and more actively involved candidates. This innovative approach to recruitment is revolutionizing the way high-volume hiring is conducted, ensuring a more efficient and effective process for all involved parties.

news.headline: Matillion named Challenger in 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Data Integration Tools for 2nd year in row.
news.summary: For the second consecutive year, the data integration company headquartered in Denver and Manchester, England, has been acknowledged for its achievements. Matillion, a leading data pipeline platform provider, has received the title of Challenger in the 2024 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Data Integration Tools. This recognition highlights the company's continued success and growth in the industry. It is a prestigious acknowledgment as Gartner® is a highly respected firm known for its thorough evaluations and assessments. Matillion's consistent performance is evident through its placement in this renowned report for the current year.

news.headline: NPower gets $1M grant from Northrop Grumman to enhance tech training for military members, aiding economic mobility.
news.summary: In New York on December 9, 2024, NPower, a prominent tech training nonprofit, announced they had secured a substantial $1 million grant from the Northrop Grumman Foundation. The grant aims to enhance economic mobility for young adults and military-affiliated individuals by supporting them in pursuing tech careers. The grant will be distributed over a period of time to assist in achieving these goals.

news.headline: Veteran trader sees strong bull market for Bitcoin, gold, silver; Brian Russ of 1971 Capital notes Ethereum undervalued.
news.summary: Brian Russ, the chief investment officer at 1971 Capital, believes that Ethereum is currently trading below its intrinsic value. According to Russ, Ethereum's price does not accurately reflect its potential for growth. Additionally, he states that Bitcoin, gold, and silver are experiencing an extended period of bullish market conditions. This suggests that these assets are expected to continue increasing in value over the foreseeable future.

news.headline: 40% of retail injuries occur in the first year, as per Sentry study. Holiday hiring adds thousands of new workers annually.
news.summary: In Stevens Point, Wisconsin, on December 9, 2024, retailers are bringing on board thousands of new employees for the holiday shopping season. The recently published 2024 Retail & Wholesale Injury Report by Sentry highlights a concerning trend. Specifically, it points out that 38% of...

news.headline: LTC Properties, Inc. announces leadership changes: Wendy Simpson as Chair, Pam Kessler and Clint Malin as Co-CEOs, Cece Chikhale as CFO.
news.summary: In Westlake Village, California, LTC Properties, Inc., a real estate investment trust focusing on seniors housing and health care properties, revealed significant leadership changes. Wendy Simpson takes on the role of Executive Chairman of the Board of Directors. Pam Kessler and Clint Malin are now Co-Chief Executive Officers, and Cece Chikhale steps into the position of Chief Financial Officer. These appointments, effective December 3, mark a key part of the Company’s succession plan.NYSE: LTC.

news.headline: Vow ASA reports trade by insiders: Rights issue of 166.7 million shares at NOK 1.50/share.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Vow ASA in Oslo announced the start of the subscription period for a rights issue of 166,666,666 new shares at a price of NOK 1.50 per share. This rights issue is fully underwritten. Certain primary insiders and close associates of these insiders have received subscription rights in this offering. The announcement follows the stock exchange communication on November 25, 2024, regarding these details.

news.headline: FreshDirect unveils 2025 food trends focusing on healthier, sustainable, convenient options.
news.summary: In Bronx, NY on December 9, 2024, FreshDirect, a prominent online grocer, revealed its forecasted food trends for 2025. The focus is on healthier, sustainable, and convenient choices as consumer demand evolves. Key highlights include a growing emphasis on nutritious and eco-friendly options, indicating a shift towards more mindful eating habits. This aligns with increasing awareness and interest in sustainable food practices. FreshDirect anticipates significant growth in these areas in the coming year.

news.headline: Ergeon expands nationwide to cover 40% of U.S households; wins Angi Super Service Award for 2024.
news.summary: A technology-driven outdoor living construction company, Ergeon, made a significant announcement on December 9, 2024, revealing its expansion across the nation to cater to 40% of households in the United States. Additionally, the company proudly received the esteemed Angi Super Service Award for the year 2024. This acknowledgment is a testament to Ergeon's dedication to excellence in their services, solidifying their position as a leading player in the industry.

news.headline: Tempus Realty Partners sells $20.3M industrial portfolio in Arkansas, exceeds projections.
news.summary: Tempus Realty Partners, a leading real estate investment partnership based in Arkansas, has recently completed a successful industrial investment comprising of two properties. The total sales generated from this endeavor amounted to $20.3 million. The portfolio consists of two industrial properties.
